key.name: window-width
key.description: The last saved width of the main window.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last saved height of the main window.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized when it was last closed.

key.name: recent-searches
key.description: Steam game search terms used recently.

key.name: saved-games
key.description: Serialized game summaries saved by the user.
